top3.sql:
SELECT name
FROM races
WHERE year = (SELECT MIN(year) FROM races)
  AND strftime('%Y-%m', date) = (
    SELECT strftime('%Y-%m', MIN(date))
    FROM races
    WHERE year = (SELECT MIN(year) FROM races)
  );

    FROM races
    WHERE year = (SELECT MIN(year) FROM races)
  );

SELECT name
FROM races
WHERE date = (
  SELECT MIN(date)
  FROM races
  WHERE year = (SELECT MIN(year) FROM races)
);
